scripts.setup: python -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run_backend.ps1" "npm --workspace apps/server run dev" "npm --workspace apps/desktop run tauri dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm --workspace apps/desktop run build
